name: Guangdong Highsun Group Co.,Ltd.
summary: Guangdong Highsun Group Co.,Ltd. primarily owns and operates urban complexes for leased property operations and self-built real estate projects in China. It owns various shopping centers, theme malls, professional wholesale markets, and commercial complexes. The company also offers smart warehousing and logistics services, industrial parks, cloud data, hotel services, and new energy vehicles and charging operations. In addition, it provides Internet microfinance, financial leasing, commercial factoring, third-party payment services, and other licenses. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Guangzhou, China.
